item.title: 哈萨克斯坦推进千兆瓦人工智能数据中心 Valley Vision
item.summary: Kazakhstan is accelerating its ambitions to become a regional AI infrastructure hub, with a USD 10 billion AI data center project in Ekibastuz moving into deployment. During a meeting with President Kassym-Jomart Tokayev on July 13, Prime Minister Olzhas Bektenov said project partners had begun rolling out 250 megawatt
